# ExamDuty

An open-source, automated exam duty roster generator tailored for educational institutions (actively used at IIIT Ranchi). 
It generates fair, conflict-free, and constraint-compliant exam duty schedules in under two minutes.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://examination-duty.vercel.app/): High-level product tour, workflow explanation, and automated scheduling features.
- [Roster Generator](https://examination-duty.vercel.app/schedule-generator): The interactive application where users upload a faculty Excel sheet, configure settings (rooms, sessions, dates), assign custom constraints (seniority exemptions, pre-assignments), and run the solver algorithm to generate and export rosters.

## Features & Constraints Resolved
- **Seniority-based Duty Distribution**: Ensures fair duty load distribution based on designation (e.g., Professor, Associate/Assistant Professor).
- **Pre-assigned Exclusions & Allowances**: Respects faculty leave, pre-assigned admin duties, and specific availability.
- **Conflict Resolution**: Avoids back-to-back duties or double-bookings for individual faculty.
- **Dynamic Export**: Instantly download verified schedules in Excel and clean print-friendly formats.
